statement: In every magma, Equation 1542 (`x = (y * y) * (z * (y * w))`) implies Equation 2362 (`x = (y * (y * (z * w))) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0600
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op z (op y w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z w))) w)
